_comment: MCP server registration template for the Edge DevTools loop. Merge this 'mcpServers' block into your Claude Code settings (~/.claude/settings.json or project-local .mcp.json). Requires that 'tools/edge-mcp/edge-debug-launch.sh' has been run first so port 9222 is reachable.

env.PLAYWRIGHT_MCP_DESCRIPTION: Drives Microsoft Edge over the Chrome DevTools Protocol (port 9222) launched via tools/edge-mcp/edge-debug-launch.sh. Provides navigate, screenshot, accessibility tree, click, fill, and evaluate.
